mapper.select: SELECT * FROM `user` WHERE student_id = #{account} OR email = #{account}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `user` (student_id, name, email, password, phone, avatar, balance, role, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{name}, #{email}, #{password}, #{phone}, #{avatar}, #{balance}, #{role}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE `user` SET password = #{password}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE `user` SET balance = #{balance}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM `user`
student_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE `user` SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
